list.title: Stories
list.welcomeBody: Create your first story to begin. Everything stays on this device.
list.noResults: No stories match your search or filters.

delete.title: Delete this story?
delete.body: This permanently removes the story and all its branches, entries, and world data. This cannot be undone.

errors.openFailed: Couldn't open the story. Please try again.
errors.favoriteFailed: Couldn't update favorite. Please try again.
errors.archiveFailed: Couldn't update the story. Please try again.
errors.deleteFailed: Couldn't delete the story. Please try again.
